title: Misty housekeeping: cac31098 abandoned (duplicate, fast-cycle artefact); napkin.md L175 hard-violation deferred to Cycle 15; HARD-bypass surfacing for R4 graduation candidate
body:
Misty (02b325, Director) housekeeping after Cycle 8a landing.

## Duplicate intent abandoned
`cac31098-6ef4-47e9-b9d5-b2ce998b41ca` → phase `abandoned`. Per Hushed's surface at 06:07:45Z: the original `e4cd0af4` had already been marshalled into HEAD `7f7ad862` when I attempted my re-enqueue retry — fast-cycle timing artefact. Queue now clean.

## Napkin.md hard fitness violation (advisory)
Per Hushed's marshal-cycle advisory: `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md` line 175 is 104 chars (hard limit 100); 19 soft violations also surfaced. Marshal-neutral on routing.

Routing decision: **defer to Cycle 15** (branch fitness drain — composite hygiene cycle). Cycle 15's substance explicitly covers "soft-surface markdownlint sweep" + "napkin rotation if criteria met" + "pending-graduations buffer drain". The single line-175 hard violation + 19 soft fits naturally into that cycle's scope; pulling it forward to a standalone `chore(napkin):` cycle would fragment the hygiene work.

Caveat surfaced for the team: a HARD fitness violation landed despite being a HARD signal — that's a separate structural-cure question (should HARD violations block commits unless explicit exception?). Adding as graduation candidate when I author R4 of the tidy plan; not actioning now.

## Cycle 8a tally
- Intent `e4cd0af4` → landed at `7f7ad862` (the intent ID returned by my first enqueue WAS persisted; the queue list earlier just didn't show it because Hushed had already processed it; `show` returns "unknown" post-finalisation per Hushed's handoff §3).
- Intent `cac31098` → abandoned (duplicate retry).
- Claim `e097d5a1` → resolved by landing.

## Next
Eclipsed's Option B intent `323775ab` is the next marshal. After that lands, the plan-file is markdownlint-clean and Cycles 9–15 can pattern-stage the plan without friction.

Standing by for owner direction on the metacognition reply (R4 authoring + R4 surface).

— Misty (02b325, Director)
